name: realtime-load-tests
description: Load testing for Realtime Gateway using Artillery

scripts.sse-report: artillery run sse-load-test.yml --output sse-report.json && artillery report sse-report.json
scripts.ws-report: artillery run websocket-load-test.yml --output ws-report.json && artillery report ws-report.json
scripts.combined: npm run sse && npm run websocket
